summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ScanSavvy landing page updates. Backend APIs fully functional (14/14 passed). Frontend shows all required features but has UI interaction issues and Emergent watermark still present.

Store logos section with 8 major retailers (Walmart, Target, Kroger, CVS, Walgreens, Costco, Publix, ALDI)

Pricing section with correct tiers (Free $0, Premium $3.99, Family $5.99)
